nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “A voice is heard in Ramah, Lamentation and bitter weeping. Rachel is weeping for her children; She refuses to be comforted for her children, Because they are no more.”

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “A voice is heard in Ramah, lamentation and bitter weeping. Rachel is weeping for her children; she refuses to be comforted for her children, because they are no more.”

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說： “在拉瑪聽見有聲音， 是痛哭哀號的聲音； 拉結為她的兒女哀哭， 不肯受安慰， 因為他們都不在了。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “在拉玛有痛哭哀号的声音， 是拉结在为儿女哀痛， 不肯接受安慰， 因为他们都死了。”
